leadText: Spritzee (Japanese: シュシュプ Shushupu) is a Fairy-type Pokémon introduced in Generation VI. It evolves into Aromatisse when traded while holding a Sachet.

sections.title: Biology
sections.text: Biology [ edit | edit source ] Spritzee is a pink, avian Pokémon . It has a rounded body and a pale blue-gray face. Most of its facial area is taken up by its curved beak, which somewhat resembles a plague doctor 's mask. It has large red-orange eyes with long black lashes. On top of its head is a curly tuft of feathers or fur. It has small wings and purple feet with no visible digits. Spritzee emits a scent that varies based on its diet and enraptures those around it using a scent pouch. In the past, royal ladies carried Spritzee with them instead of using perfume. Prior to Generation VIII , Spritzee and its evolved form, Aromatisse , were the only known Pokémon that could have Aroma Veil as an Ability . Evolution [ edit | edit source ] Spritzee evolves into Aromatisse . (For specifics on this Pokémon's Evolution in the games, refer to Game data→Evolution data .) Unevolved Spritzee Fairy → First Evolution Aromatisse Fairy

Generation VII Alola #— Kanto #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Generation VII . Generation VIII Galar #212 Isle of Armor #— Crown Tundra #— Sinnoh #— Hisui #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Brilliant Diamond, Shining Pearl , and Legends: Arceus . Sword A scent pouch within this Pokémon's body allows it to create various scents. A change in its diet will alter the fragrance it produces. Shield The scent its body gives off enraptures those who smell it. Noble ladies had no shortage of love for Spritzee. Generation IX Paldea #— Kitakami #— Blueberry #— Lumiose #096 Hyperspace #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokémon Scarlet and Violet . Legends: Z-A In the past, rather than using perfume, royal ladies carried a Spritzee that would waft a fragrance they liked. Spin-off games Pokopia #— This Pokémon has no Pokédex entries in Pokopia . sections.title: Pokédex entries
sections.text: Pokédex entries [ edit | edit source ] Episode Pokémon Source Entry XY073 Spritzee Ash's Pokédex Spritzee, the Perfume Pokémon. Spritzee gives off a fragrance that delights anyone who smells it, which changes depending on what Spritzee eats.
